title: Improve GitHub Actions workflow for diff-only mode and line formatting
description: User requested improvements to .github/workflow/main.yml for the automatic peer review using OpenAI. Requested changes: 1) Make it only run in diff mode, 2) Resolve issues with line lengths and newlines where they don't belong.
closed_reason: Successfully implemented requested improvements to GitHub Actions workflow
requirements: Workflow should run only in diff mode
Fix line length and newline formatting issues
Maintain existing functionality while improving code quality

changes_made: Set MODE=diff explicitly in environment variables (line 42)
Updated system prompt to enforce diff-only review scope (lines 85-93)
Improved JSON formatting with proper line breaks and indentation (lines 66-72, 147-162)
Enhanced patch processing to handle line length issues (lines 62-76)
Added proper shell script formatting with set -euo pipefail for reliability
Standardized multiline string formatting in jq commands (lines 188-209)
improvements: Workflow now enforces diff-only mode consistently
Better readability with proper JSON formatting
More robust error handling in shell scripts
Cleaner line formatting throughout the workflow file
Maintained backward compatibility while fixing formatting issues

user_feedback_positive: Requested workflow improvements have been successfully implemented with enhanced diff-only mode and proper formatting
